text:
human population, humans that live in the same locality, also known as residents, inhabitants, population. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "peoples",
 "population"
- geography of topic: "population geography"
- main Wikidata property: "population",
 "tabular population"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary"
- studied by: "demography",
 "demographic statistics",
 "sociodemography"
- different from: "number of individuals",
 "population"
- Commons category: "Human populations"
- has part(s) of the class: "human"
